seo.title: Woguiro - Photographer & Filmmaker | Portugal
seo.description: Photography and videography for those who refuse the ordinary. Lisbon - Worldwide.

hero.title: WOGUIRO
hero.tagline: Photography & Videography for those who refuse the ordinary.

works.title: Photography, motion and direction with a point of view.
works.description: A curated front page blend of still image, motion and commercial instinct. Each focus opens a deeper editorial read inside the homepage.

street-narrative.title: Street Narrative
street-narrative.subtitle: Light, silence and human texture inside the city.
street-narrative.description: A still-image direction built around atmosphere first. The frame stays minimal, but every crop carries tension, movement and premium editorial control.

artist-motion-cut.title: Artist Motion Cut
artist-motion-cut.subtitle: Visual language for artists who want mood before noise.
artist-motion-cut.description: Motion work shaped for music, performance and identity. The pacing is cinematic, the grading stays controlled and the final cut feels intentional instead of overloaded.
focusPoints: Built for reels, clips and social edits

brand-pulse.title: Brand Pulse
brand-pulse.subtitle: Commercial instinct translated into sharp visual rhythm.
brand-pulse.description: A cleaner commercial cut for brands and UGC work. Product framing, rhythm and call-to-action spacing are treated with the same care as the image itself.
focusPoints: Cutdowns for paid and organic usage

portrait-study.title: Portrait Study
portrait-study.subtitle: Stillness, restraint and presence with zero visual waste.
portrait-study.description: Portrait sessions tuned to identity and presence. Minimal backgrounds, precise light and a restrained palette let expression do the heavy lifting.

ugc-signal.title: UGC Signal
ugc-signal.subtitle: Fast, tactile content that still feels authored.
ugc-signal.description: UGC direction that does not fall into generic content formulas. Framing, rhythm and product proximity are tuned for trust and repeat watching.

aboutPreview.title: Built between street instinct, cinematic motion and creative direction.
aboutPreview.description: Guiro operates as a photographer, videographer and visual director with a premium eye for atmosphere, movement and brand sensitivity.
aboutPreview.body: Based in Portugal, working across Europe and beyond, he combines independent taste with execution that feels commercially sharp.
disciplinesList: Street, portrait and still-image systems with a cinematic eye.
Motion-led visuals for music, reels, campaigns and narrative cuts.
Creative direction that aligns mood, framing, colour and pace.
Commercial and UGC work designed for brand relevance and clarity.
Visual identities for artists, covers, clips and atmosphere-heavy campaigns.
Music sensitivity that sharpens rhythm, edits and emotional timing.

contact.title: Let's build imagery that refuses the ordinary.
contact.description: Available for photo, motion, artist visuals, UGC and creative direction. Short brief or full production, both start here.
